title: Auth hub follow-up fixes (setup-beskid-web, submodules)

source.subject: Updated packages and their use across all sites

body:
Hardened auth hub rollout: package sync across site/auth/tracker/nexus, bundling fixes, and deployment alignment.

## What shipped

- Package sync (`870ef7b`, `512007a`) — `@beskid/*` consumers aligned
- TS service bundling fixes (`328e571`)
- Tracker deployment fixes + nexus in hub (`49c49d7`)
- Observability pass (`bc9f2e0`) — shared `@beskid/server-observability`

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`870ef7b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/870ef7b)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-29

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`
